ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "ut_datetime" TEXT /* Universal Time of the observation */,
  "local_datetime" TEXT /* Local time of the observation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the observation */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event */,
  "magnitude" INTEGER /* Magnitude of the meteorite event */,
  "d_sound" TEXT /* Description of sound observed during the event */,
  "c_sound" TEXT /* Description of the sonic characteristics */,
  "fragment" TEXT /* Fragmentation state of the meteorite */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer reporting the event */,
  "experience_level" INTEGER /* Experience level of the observer */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization managing the observation */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the observation location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the observation location */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the observation location */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the observation */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the observation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to any images captured during the observation */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to any videos captured during the observation */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL to any audio recordings captured during the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_duration FOREIGN KEY ("duration") REFERENCES duration_types ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_d_sound FOREIGN KEY ("d_sound") REFERENCES sound_characteristics ("sound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_fragment FOREIGN KEY ("fragment") REFERENCES fragments ("fragment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_magnitude FOREIGN KEY ("magnitude") REFERENCES magnitudes ("magnitude_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_c_sound FOREIGN KEY ("c_sound") REFERENCES sound_characteristics ("sound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_experience_level FOREIGN KEY ("experience_level") REFERENCES experience_levels ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" TEXT /* Altitude of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the location above sea level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the observer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the observer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the observer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the observer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the observer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the observer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the observer registered */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date when the observer was last active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the organization */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the organization */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the organization */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the organization's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experience_levels" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for experience level */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Description of the experience level (e.g., novice, expert) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experience level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sound_characteristics" (
  "sound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sound characteristic */,
  "d_sound_description" TEXT /* Description of directional sound during meteorite event */,
  "c_sound_description" TEXT /* Description of contextual sound during meteorite event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sound characteristics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fragments" (
  "fragment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fragment state */,
  "fragment_description" TEXT /* Description of the fragmentation state */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the fragmentation state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fragment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnitudes" (
  "magnitude_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnitude */,
  "magnitude_value" INTEGER /* Magnitude value of the meteorite event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the magnitude */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("magnitude_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "duration_types" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration type */,
  "duration_description" TEXT /* Description of the duration type (e.g., short, long) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the duration type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" TEXT /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the observation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the observation */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., observer, researcher, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date when the user was last active on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
